title: 2026 Grammys Awards Predictions in Every Category
text: Variety's chief awards editor Clayton Davis released final Grammy predictions for the 68th annual Grammy Awards ceremony, airing February 1, 2026 on CBS. The predictions cover major categories including Record of the Year. Predicted Winner: Kendrick Lamar & SZA — "Luther". Contenders: "Abracadabra" — Lady Gaga, "Anxiety" — Doechii, "APT." — Rosé & Bruno Mars, "DtMF" — Bad Bunny, "Manchild" — Sabrina Carpenter, "The Subway" — Chappell Roan, "Wildflower" — Billie Eilish. The experts characterize this category as "another near toss-up." Kendrick Lamar appears positioned to win based on his dominance throughout the year, with "'Luther,' bolstered by the SZA assist" viewed as strong positioning. However, voter fatigue could shift outcomes. Some voters may feel Lamar already received sufficient recognition last year when his track won both record and song honors, potentially opening opportunities for competitors. Alternative scenarios include Lady Gaga's "Abracadabra" winning as her first major category victory, or Bad Bunny's cultural impact propelling him into contention. Billie Eilish remains a potential surprise winner despite off-cycle positioning.
